title: Loki and the Holy Knights
description: On pages 2–4, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Robin, Saul, Gunko, Unknown person #2, World Government as The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.
scene: The Elbaf conflict sharpens around Loki, the God’s Knights, giant children, and the secrets of the island’s royal past.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: it still sends chills down my spine... what a tragedy.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The mortifying screams I heard from that inferno...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: to think she sank all those warships too!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She's a devil masquerading as an eight year-old!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We cannot let the world know the full details!!

dialogue.speaker: Gunko
dialogue.text: This brutal incident would trauma children everywhere!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you see her, just report it! Do not approach!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Huh?! That fugitive is on this island?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I saw her!! She had the eyes of a stone-cold killer!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Look at that bounty!! Let's shoot to kill!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Don't hold back just 'cause she looks young!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I can't sleep knowing she's out there!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I wish she'd just die already!!!

dialogue.speaker: World Government
dialogue.text: The Marines need to take her out!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: She's an enemy of the world!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I'm scared... I'm so scared of everyone...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: DERSHI SHI SHI SHI SHI SH! SH!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She leaves a trail of thefts and murder wherever she goes.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I hear she uses her childlike appearance lure poor souls in,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Only to slit their throats as they sleep!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: That little shit should go snuff it!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I sure hope she drops dead.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Dereski shi shi shi shi shi sh!!

summary: This part advances the Loki and the Holy Knights through 50 cleaned dialogue beats, emphasizing the core conflict, character stakes, and transition into the next movement of the story.
